list.vod_content: On a chilling Halloween night, a supernatural trickster known as The Jester encounters Max, a fearless 15-year-old girl. Together, they form an uneasy alliance to confront a powerful magician whose dark abilities push MaxвҖҷs courage and cleverness to the limit in a thrilling showdown.

list.vod_content: The film tells the story of Martha Hoffman, an eccentric and wealthy patron who is committed to a psychiatric clinic by her daughters. The expert witness Casares investigates whether this is a scheme to control their motherвҖҷs fortune or if Martha truly suffers from a form of dementia that endangers her well-being and that of her family.
